decisions.relationship_evidence: Scoping review assesses how ABMs have been applied and identifies substantive modeling gaps.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Method-focused review develops a taxonomy and recommends directions for improving BBV ABMs.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an agent-based population simulation to assess COVID-19 transmission and interventions in Catalonia.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 application using an agent-based simulation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Implements an agent-based simulation model to compare COVID-19 inoculation strategies across 84 scenarios.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete vaccination-strategy application for COVID-19.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an ABM to simulate health-care seeking and assess apparent geographic MRSA disparities.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete MRSA and EHR-bias application of an ABM.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes the design and software implementation of the open-source BharatSim agent-based framework.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Provides an implemented, reusable agent-based modeling framework and domain-specific language.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and establishes a continuous-time ABM as a reusable feedlot AMR simulation tool.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicitly provides a parameterized feedlot simulation tool.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an individual-level microsimulation model to estimate HPV screening effects and outcomes.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops a generic integrated ABM combining disease, mobility, and wastewater processes across resolutions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development of an integrated, pathogen-general agent-based model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an agent-based model to estimate influenza effects of increased childhood vaccination.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes an agent-based SEI model for dynamic bloodborne-pathogen transmission within hospitals.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Benchmarks alternative microsimulation time representations for runtime efficiency and potential bias.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit performance and bias evaluation of microsimulation cycle-length designs.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses an empirical-data-informed ABM to study avian-influenza perpetuation during goose molt.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a vessel-and-crew microsimulation to compare pandemic-control strategies at ports.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes NeurABM, a novel framework integrating neural networks with an ABM for hospital infections.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a calibrated agent-based network simulation to study rural HCV transmission among PWID.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HCV network-transmission application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses CityCOVID to demonstrate and compare a random-forest surrogate approach for ABM calibration.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Methodological source addressing computationally prohibitive calibration of stochastic ABMs.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reviews limitations and methodological challenges in incorporating social determinants into HIV ABMs.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Method-focused review gives uncertainty-handling guidance and future research directions.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces a novel survey-based method for generating health-rich synthetic populations for spatial ABMs.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development for initializing spatial agent-based models.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Provides the ramp.micro R package for building, solving, analyzing, and visualizing mosquito microsimulations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit software implementation supporting behavioral-state microsimulation models.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents a modular, performance-engineered ABM supporting realistic mobility and configurable interventions.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Protocol explicitly proposes developing an ABM from group-model-building evidence for housing and HIV outcomes.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses microsimulation to quantify vaccine-related financial-risk protection across 52 countries.

decisions.relationship_evidence: “Agent-based” denotes an LLM agentic AI platform, not agent- or individual-based epidemiological simulation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes a hybrid forecasting model combining ABM with ARIMAX time-series analysis.
